overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk city street from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, street crossings, and pedestrians. The character walks through a dense urban environment with heavy Japanese-inspired signage and architectural elements, occasionally looking up at the towering structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalks and neon signage

events.description: turns right onto the sidewalk after crossing the initial street
turns back toward the crosswalk to return to the intersection

agents.ego_description: crosses the street, turns right onto the sidewalk, walks past the Fuyutsuki building, then turns back toward the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection in the background

entered.detail: tall building with prominent red neon 'Fuyutsuki' signage
yellow striped crosswalk markings on the asphalt
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
large glowing advertisement screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a major intersection in a cyberpunk city, crossing the street and turning right onto a sidewalk lined with the Fuyutsuki building. The camera explores the area briefly before turning back toward the crosswalk, with digital billboards and an overhead walkway visible throughout.

events.description: black sports car drives past the camera while waiting at the crosswalk
begins crossing the street again toward the opposite side

agents.ego_description: waits at the crosswalk for traffic to pass, then crosses the street alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving across the crosswalk from left to right
pedestrian in distinctive red pants crossing the street toward the camera

entered.detail: pedestrian signal post showing yellow walk symbol
cluster of skyscrapers with vertical neon lighting rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: Waiting at the crosswalk, a black sports car passes by before the character crosses the street again. The scene features opposing pedestrian traffic and the approach toward towering neon-lit skyscrapers in the distance, with the overhead walkway drawing closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown corridor between towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the skyscrapers and neon signs overhead
camera tilts back down to street level to continue walking

agents.ego_description: walks along the sidewalk while looking up at the towering neon-lit skyscrapers and advertisements overhead

entered.detail: large red neon sign with tiger logo and Japanese text reading 'タイガー'
tall vertical advertisement screens mounted on building sides
tall glass and steel building facade rising high above the street

segments.scene_description: Walking between massive skyscrapers in a narrow urban canyon, the camera tilts upward to admire the towering glass facades and bright neon signage, including a prominent red Tyger Claws sign, before returning gaze to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with corporate signage and storefronts

events.description: passes under the Marmur Bank overhead sign into a denser commercial section

agents.ego_description: continues walking down the busy sidewalk past various pedestrians and corporate storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large overhead archway sign reading 'MARMUR BANK' in white illuminated letters
neon sign with 'MILFGUARD' text in pink and blue
blue medical sign with 'AESCULAPIUS' text and caduceus symbol
blue neon sign with Japanese text 'ホテル' indicating hotel

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the commercial street, the camera passes under prominent corporate signage including Marmur Bank, Milfguard, and Aesculapius. The sidewalk becomes more crowded with pedestrians as the character approaches the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide city intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins by crossing a major street and turning along the sidewalk of the Fuyutsuki building, where digital billboards and an overhead walkway frame the view. As the camera pauses at a crosswalk and a black sports car streaks past, the perspective shifts back across the street, drawing closer to the looming silhouettes of distant skyscrapers. The scene then tightens into a narrow corridor of glass and light, where the camera tilts upward to admire towering facades and a glowing red Tyger Claws sign before returning to the pavement. Finally, the movement continues past a dense row of corporate signage for Marmur Bank, Milfguard, and Aesculapius, weaving through an increasing crowd of pedestrians toward the next intersection.
